## 2024-06-11 - Add Missing Form Labels to Scaffold Templates
**Learning:** Form inputs generated by the scaffold templates (both ECR and Slang) for standard text fields and `text_area` lacked associated `<label>` tags. This led to inaccessible forms by default in newly generated Amber applications, hurting screen reader users and making the forms harder to navigate.
**Action:** Added `<%= label(:field_name) %>` standard to scaffold templates so all generated Amber forms default to a more accessible and user-friendly experience right out of the box.
